title: Admin Sign-In - Functional Test Plan
author: QA Automation
overview: Functional testing of the Admin Sign-In flow for the AT/AD Admin Portal. Covers sign-in page access, email and password authentication, form validation, successful and failed authentication flows, session management, logout behavior, and edge cases including account lockout and inline validation.

inScope: Admin Sign-In page access from Admin Portal URL
Successful authentication and redirect to Admin Dashboard
Admin name and role visibility in header after login
Session maintenance and session timeout handling
outOfScope: Backend session configuration and timeout settings

linkedBugs: SCRUM-2310 - Admin Name and Role Not Displayed in Header (Mismatch with Figma Design)

prerequisites: Inactive/suspended admin account for negative testing

testCases.title: Verify Admin Sign-In page is accessible from Admin Portal URL
testCases.acceptanceCriteria: AC1 - Admin can access the Admin Sign-In page from the Admin Portal URL
testCases.preconditions: Admin Portal URL is available and user is not logged in
steps: Navigate to the Admin Portal URL
Verify the Sign-In page loads successfully
Verify the page title or heading indicates Admin Sign-In
expectedResults: Admin Portal URL resolves and page loads
Sign-In page is displayed with login form
Page clearly identifies as Admin Sign-In
testCases.postconditions: Admin Sign-In page is displayed

testCases.title: Verify Email and Password fields are present on Sign-In page
testCases.acceptanceCriteria: AC2 - Admin can sign in using Email and Password
testCases.preconditions: Admin is on the Sign-In page
steps: Verify both fields have appropriate labels and placeholders
expectedResults: Email input field is visible and editable
Password input field is visible and editable
Fields have clear labels (e.g., 'Email', 'Password')
Password field masks characters as they are typed
testCases.postconditions: Both credential fields are accessible

testCases.title: Verify Sign In button is disabled when both fields are empty
testCases.acceptanceCriteria: AC3 - Sign In button is enabled only when both fields are valid
testCases.preconditions: Admin is on the Sign-In page with empty fields
steps: Observe the Sign In button state
expectedResults: Email field is empty
Password field is empty
Sign In button is disabled or visually indicates it cannot be clicked
testCases.postconditions: Sign In button remains disabled

testCases.title: Verify Sign In button is disabled when only Email is entered
testCases.acceptanceCriteria: AC3 - Sign In button is enabled only when both fields are valid
testCases.preconditions: Admin is on the Sign-In page
steps: Enter a valid email in the Email field
Observe the Sign In button state
expectedResults: Email is entered
Password field is empty
Sign In button remains disabled
testCases.postconditions: Sign In button is not clickable

testCases.title: Verify Sign In button is disabled when only Password is entered
testCases.acceptanceCriteria: AC3 - Sign In button is enabled only when both fields are valid
testCases.preconditions: Admin is on the Sign-In page
steps: Enter a valid password in the Password field
Observe the Sign In button state
expectedResults: Email field is empty
Password is entered
Sign In button remains disabled
testCases.postconditions: Sign In button is not clickable

testCases.title: Verify Sign In button is enabled when both fields have valid input
testCases.acceptanceCriteria: AC3 - Sign In button is enabled only when both fields are valid
testCases.preconditions: Admin is on the Sign-In page
steps: Enter a valid email in the Email field
Enter a valid password in the Password field
Observe the Sign In button state
expectedResults: Email is entered with valid format
Password is entered
Sign In button becomes enabled and clickable
testCases.postconditions: Sign In button is ready for submission

testCases.title: Verify Sign In button remains disabled with invalid email format
testCases.acceptanceCriteria: AC3 - Sign In button is enabled only when both fields are valid; Edge Case - Incorrect email format
testCases.preconditions: Admin is on the Sign-In page
steps: Observe the Sign In button state
expectedResults: Invalid email is entered
Password is entered
Sign In button remains disabled or inline validation error is shown
testCases.postconditions: Sign In is blocked for invalid email

testCases.title: Verify successful authentication redirects to Admin Dashboard
testCases.acceptanceCriteria: AC4 - On successful authentication, Admin is redirected to the Admin Dashboard
testCases.preconditions: Admin has valid credentials and is on the Sign-In page
expectedResults: Email is accepted
Password is accepted
Sign In is submitted
Admin is redirected to the Admin Dashboard page
testCases.postconditions: Admin is logged in and on the Dashboard

testCases.title: Verify Admin name and role are visible in header after successful login
testCases.acceptanceCriteria: AC4 - Admin name and role are visible in the header
testCases.preconditions: Admin has successfully logged in and is on the Dashboard
steps: Log in with valid admin credentials
Observe the header section of the Admin Dashboard
expectedResults: Login is successful
Header section is visible
Admin name is displayed in the header
Admin role (e.g., Super Admin) is displayed in the header
testCases.postconditions: Admin identity is visible in header

testCases.title: Verify error message on failed authentication with wrong password
testCases.acceptanceCriteria: AC5 - On failed authentication, clear error message is displayed; Edge Case - error message without revealing which field is wrong
testCases.preconditions: Admin is on the Sign-In page with a valid email
expectedResults: Email is entered
Incorrect password is entered
Sign In is submitted
Generic error message is displayed (e.g., 'Invalid email or password') without revealing which field is wrong
testCases.postconditions: Admin remains on Sign-In page

testCases.title: Verify error message on failed authentication with wrong email
testCases.acceptanceCriteria: AC5 - On failed authentication, clear error message is displayed
testCases.preconditions: Admin is on the Sign-In page
expectedResults: Non-existent email is entered
Password is entered
Sign In is submitted
Generic error message is displayed (e.g., 'Invalid email or password') without revealing that the email doesn't exist
testCases.postconditions: Admin remains on Sign-In page

testCases.title: Verify inline validation for incorrect email format
testCases.acceptanceCriteria: Edge Case - Incorrect email format → inline validation
testCases.preconditions: Admin is on the Sign-In page
steps: Tab out of the Email field or click elsewhere
expectedResults: Invalid email is entered
Inline validation error appears near the Email field
Error message indicates invalid email format
Second invalid format also triggers inline validation
Validation message is clear and specific
testCases.postconditions: Inline validation is displayed for invalid email

testCases.title: Verify session is maintained after successful login
testCases.acceptanceCriteria: AC6 - Session is maintained until logout or session timeout
testCases.preconditions: Admin has successfully logged in
steps: Log in with valid admin credentials
Navigate to different pages within the Admin Portal
expectedResults: Login is successful
Navigation between pages maintains the session
Browser refresh does not log out the admin
Admin session persists across page interactions
testCases.postconditions: Session is active and maintained

testCases.title: Verify logout clears session and redirects to Sign-In page
testCases.acceptanceCriteria: Edge Case - Logout clears session and redirects to Sign-In page
testCases.preconditions: Admin is logged in to the Admin Portal
steps: Log in with valid admin credentials
Locate and click the Logout option
Attempt to navigate back to the Dashboard using browser back button or direct URL
expectedResults: Login is successful
Logout option is clicked
Admin is redirected to the Sign-In page
Navigating back does not restore the session; admin must sign in again
testCases.postconditions: Session is cleared and admin is on Sign-In page

testCases.title: Verify Sign In button is disabled when email field has only whitespace
testCases.acceptanceCriteria: AC3 - Sign In button is enabled only when both fields are valid
testCases.preconditions: Admin is on the Sign-In page
steps: Enter only spaces in the Email field
Observe the Sign In button state
expectedResults: Whitespace-only email is entered
Password is entered
Sign In button remains disabled or validation error is shown
testCases.postconditions: Whitespace-only input is rejected

testCases.title: Verify Sign-In page supports keyboard navigation
testCases.acceptanceCriteria: Accessibility - Keyboard navigation
testCases.preconditions: Admin is on the Sign-In page
steps: Use Tab key to navigate to the Email field
Tab to the Sign In button
Press Enter or Space to submit
expectedResults: Email field receives focus via Tab
Email can be typed
Password field receives focus via Tab
Password can be typed
Sign In button receives focus via Tab
Form submits on Enter/Space when Sign In button is focused
testCases.postconditions: Form is fully operable via keyboard

testCases.title: Verify focus indicators are visible on all interactive elements
testCases.acceptanceCriteria: Accessibility - Focus indicators
testCases.preconditions: Admin is on the Sign-In page using keyboard navigation
steps: Tab through Email field, Password field, and Sign In button
Observe focus indicators on each element
Verify focus is clearly visible and distinguishable
expectedResults: Each interactive element shows a visible focus indicator when focused
Focus indicators are clearly distinguishable from the default state
Focus moves in a logical order
testCases.postconditions: Focus indicators are properly implemented

testCases.title: Verify form fields have proper labels for screen readers
testCases.acceptanceCriteria: Accessibility - Screen reader support
testCases.preconditions: Admin is on the Sign-In page
steps: Inspect Email field for associated label or aria-label
Inspect Password field for associated label or aria-label
Inspect Sign In button for accessible name
Verify error messages are associated with fields via aria-describedby or similar
expectedResults: Email field has a programmatically associated label
Password field has a programmatically associated label
Sign In button has an accessible name
Error messages are linked to their respective fields for screen reader announcement
testCases.postconditions: Form is accessible to screen readers

testCases.title: Verify complete Admin Sign-In flow end-to-end
testCases.acceptanceCriteria: AC1-AC6 - Complete Flow
testCases.preconditions: Admin has valid credentials and is not logged in
steps: Verify Sign In button is enabled
Verify admin name and role in header
expectedResults: Admin Portal URL loads Sign-In page
Sign-In page displays email and password fields
Email is accepted
Password is accepted
Sign In button is enabled
Authentication is successful
Admin Dashboard is displayed
Admin name and role are visible in the header
Logout is successful
Admin is redirected to Sign-In page and session is cleared
testCases.postconditions: Full sign-in and logout cycle is complete

testCases.title: Verify error message clears after correcting credentials and resubmitting
testCases.acceptanceCriteria: AC5 - Failed authentication error handling
testCases.preconditions: Admin is on the Sign-In page and has triggered an error message
steps: Enter invalid credentials and click Sign In
Correct the credentials to valid values
Verify error message is cleared and login succeeds
expectedResults: Error message is displayed for invalid credentials
Error message is visible
Credentials are corrected
Login succeeds on resubmission
Error message is no longer displayed
testCases.postconditions: Admin is logged in after correcting credentials

testCases.title: Verify password field does not allow copy of masked text
testCases.acceptanceCriteria: Security - Password field behavior
testCases.preconditions: Admin is on the Sign-In page
steps: Enter a password in the Password field
Attempt to select and copy the password text
Paste in another field or text editor
expectedResults: Password is entered and masked
Copy action does not copy the actual password text
Pasted content is empty or masked
testCases.postconditions: Password cannot be copied from the field

userAccounts: Active admin account with valid email and password
Non-existent admin email for negative testing
credentials: Valid admin email and password pair

assumptions: Admin Portal URL is accessible in the test environment
At least one active admin account exists for testing
An inactive/suspended admin account is available for negative testing
Account lockout feature may or may not be enabled (test conditionally)
Session timeout is configured in the test environment
risks: Account lockout threshold and duration are unknown — may need backend configuration
Session timeout duration is unknown — may require waiting or simulation
SCRUM-2310 (Admin name/role not displayed in header) is a known open bug that may cause TC_SCRUM442_009 to fail
openQuestions: What is the account lockout threshold (number of failed attempts before lock)?
What is the session timeout duration?
Is there a 'Remember Me' or 'Stay Signed In' option?
Is there a password visibility toggle on the password field?
Is there a 'Forgot Password' link on the Sign-In page (separate story)?
notesFromLinkedIssues: SCRUM-2310: Admin Name and Role Not Displayed in Header — this is a known bug (To Do status) that directly impacts AC4 verification of admin name and role in header after login.
